design_goal: Swappable Auto-GM case modules chosen by tarot domain, campaign theme, and location/story tags. Expanded Pass 10 doubles modular case parts before repo upload.

majors.name: The Fool
majors.upright: A hidden layer or second thread opens.
majors.reversed: Assumptions fail; the Wardens are in the wrong story.

majors.name: The Magician
majors.upright: A deliberate supernatural method is steering events.
majors.reversed: Power destabilizes and turns unsafe.

majors.name: The High Priestess
majors.upright: A hidden truth can be revealed.
majors.reversed: False certainty or misleading evidence.

majors.name: The Empress
majors.upright: The threat is being fed or cultivated.
majors.reversed: Growth becomes corruption.

majors.name: The Emperor
majors.upright: A faction or hierarchy intervenes.
majors.reversed: Authority blocks access or suppresses truth.

majors.name: The Hierophant
majors.upright: Sacred structure or ritual order matters.
majors.reversed: Corrupted rite or rigid dogma harms the hunt.

majors.name: The Lovers
majors.upright: A relationship, pact, or tether defines the case.
majors.reversed: Betrayal or painful severance.

majors.name: The Chariot
majors.upright: Pace accelerates toward a chase or countdown.
majors.reversed: Loss of control; timing turns hostile.

majors.name: Strength
majors.upright: Self-control, affliction, or possession pressure is central.
majors.reversed: Control breaks under pressure.

majors.name: The Hermit
majors.upright: A solitary clue or isolated witness is key.
majors.reversed: The team is cut off or support is lost.

majors.name: Wheel of Fortune
majors.upright: Timing, repetition, and reversal shift the case.
majors.reversed: Bad timing hurts the team.

majors.name: Justice
majors.upright: A debt, lie, or old wrong must be exposed.
majors.reversed: False accusation complicates the hunt.

majors.name: The Hanged Man
majors.upright: Progress requires a real cost.
majors.reversed: A stall wastes a critical window.

majors.name: Death
majors.upright: The threat changes form or phase.
majors.reversed: Mutation or unstable escalation.

majors.name: Temperance
majors.upright: Mixed forces can be stabilized.
majors.reversed: Imbalance doubles danger.

majors.name: The Devil
majors.upright: Temptation, possession, or dark leverage grows.
majors.reversed: A chance to resist appears, but not freely.

majors.name: The Tower
majors.upright: Breach, structural failure, or catastrophe hits.
majors.reversed: Collapse is delayed and dread builds.

majors.name: The Star
majors.upright: A clue, recovery window, or moral center appears.
majors.reversed: False hope comforts before it misleads.

majors.name: The Moon
majors.upright: Concealment and false readings cloud the hunt.
majors.reversed: The hidden thing is forced into view.

majors.name: The Sun
majors.upright: Truth is exposed and false leads burn away.
majors.reversed: Success comes with cost or overconfidence.

majors.name: Judgment
majors.upright: A confrontation must happen.
majors.reversed: Outcome is postponed but pressure remains.

majors.name: The World
majors.upright: A case closes or a milestone is marked.
majors.reversed: An unfinished thread survives.

blades.name: Blades
blades.opening: An attack has already happened or is about to.

blood.name: Blood
blood.opening: The human story is the key to the case.

relics.name: Relics
relics.opening: What the Wardens can use matters as much as what they face.

sigils.name: Sigils
sigils.opening: A structure of magic is active.

module_rules.cross_link_rule: Every case should have at least one witness-to-location chain, one evidence-to-entity chain, one research-to-weakness chain, and one prep-to-confrontation chain.

campaign_themes.name: Nine Circles Around One Black Star
campaign_themes.season_pressure: Ancient seals are weakening and unrelated cases share the black star mark.

campaign_themes.name: The Lost Warden Files
campaign_themes.season_pressure: Old Warden cases were misfiled on purpose and the truth is resurfacing.

campaign_themes.name: The Choir Beneath
campaign_themes.season_pressure: Multiple mouths sing the same phrase in different towns.

campaign_themes.name: Thin Veil Nights
campaign_themes.season_pressure: The dead are becoming easier to hear and harder to dismiss.

campaign_themes.name: The Iron Oath
campaign_themes.season_pressure: Fae rules bind victims before anyone realizes a deal was made.

campaign_themes.name: The Children Who Remember
campaign_themes.season_pressure: Children begin remembering lives they never lived and places beneath town they never visited.

campaign_themes.name: The Badge and the Black Star
campaign_themes.season_pressure: Local institutions are not merely covering up cases; they are unknowingly completing one.

campaign_themes.name: Every Door Has a Price
campaign_themes.season_pressure: Doorways, bridges, wells, and elevators begin acting like negotiated borders instead of architecture.

campaign_themes.name: The Choir in the Wires
campaign_themes.season_pressure: A voice network spreads through radios, phones, alarms, and emergency channels.

campaign_themes.name: The Cache That Lied
campaign_themes.season_pressure: Old Warden caches appear right before attacks, but their contents point hunters toward the wrong weakness.

location_modules.name: Abandoned Church
location_modules.description: Pews rot beneath plastic sheets. The altar has been moved recently, leaving a clean rectangle in the dust.
surface_clues: Fresh candle wax near the altar.
A draft comes up from below the floorboards.
hidden_clues: The altar was repositioned to expose a seam in the foundation.

location_modules.name: Church Basement
location_modules.description: The basement smells of old lime, wet stone, and scorched rope. Chalk marks have been scrubbed but not erased.
surface_clues: Scrubbed sigil fragments remain in floor cracks.
A rusted chain disappears behind a bricked arch.
hidden_clues: The chain once held a bell, not a prisoner.

location_modules.name: The Lower Room
location_modules.description: The stone here is older than the church. An inverted bell hangs from a blackened frame, silent but vibrating in the teeth.
surface_clues: Nine circles surround a black star carved beneath the bell.
Dust avoids the center of the floor.
hidden_clues: The bell is a resonator for weakening a seal, not the source itself.

location_modules.name: Graveyard Edge
location_modules.description: Several headstones lean away from the church as if recoiling. One grave has sunken unevenly.
surface_clues: A recent footprint stops at an old miner's grave.
Salt has been poured in a broken semicircle.
hidden_clues: The wrong remains were blessed during the last containment.

location_modules.name: Church Annex
location_modules.description: A folding table is covered in coffee rings, old pamphlets, and a sign-in sheet with the bottom half torn away.
surface_clues: Meeting notes mention a youth group that does not appear on the official schedule.
Someone replaced the smoke detector battery yesterday.
hidden_clues: The meeting times line up with the bell heard underground.

location_modules.name: Town Records Office
location_modules.description: Microfiche machines hum beside cabinets that smell of dust and water damage.
surface_clues: The church was condemned twice but never demolished.
A mine map is missing its lowest chamber.
hidden_clues: A previous Warden team sealed the mine and erased the report.

location_modules.name: Hospital Room
location_modules.description: The patient monitor ticks steadily. The survivor's eyes keep tracking the ceiling corner when no one is there.
surface_clues: Black ash is packed beneath the survivor's fingernails.
The survivor repeats a phrase in a voice too low for their throat.
hidden_clues: The survivor heard the bell before the possession spike.

location_modules.name: Sheriff's Office
location_modules.description: The case board calls it vandalism. The locked drawer says otherwise.
surface_clues: The sheriff has a report from a similar incident fifteen years ago.
A deputy's bodycam corrupted at 3:09 a.m.
hidden_clues: The sheriff was told by a Warden handler to keep the church sealed.

location_modules.name: Rail Yard
location_modules.description: Freight cars sit open like empty mouths. Something has dragged metal shavings into a spiral.
surface_clues: Claw marks run along the underside of a freight car.
A torn jacket sleeve is caught on rusted wire.
hidden_clues: The entity avoids crossing iron rails unless chasing prey.

location_modules.name: Room 6, Mercy Motor Inn
location_modules.description: A cheap motel room with the curtains taped shut. Someone has written dates across the mirror in soap.
surface_clues: The dates match missing-person reports.
The bathroom light flickers when the church is mentioned.
hidden_clues: A witness hid here after seeing the lower room.

location_modules.name: Harlan Family House
location_modules.description: Family photos line the wall, but one frame is turned face-down and salted at the corners.
surface_clues: A young man's jacket smells like candle smoke and river mud.
A phone buzzes with unsent texts about the meetings.
hidden_clues: The son kept a token from beneath the church as proof of initiation.
suggestions: ask Mrs Harlan about her son

location_modules.name: Blackwater River Bridge
location_modules.description: A rusted bridge where fog sits below the railing like held breath.
surface_clues: The river runs backward for thirteen seconds.
hidden_clues: A coin under the bridge is dated tomorrow.

location_modules.name: Salvage Yard
location_modules.description: Piles of scrap form narrow canyons. A Warden field locker is hidden inside an old refrigerator shell.
surface_clues: A broken EMF reader still blinks toward the church.
Silver filings are scattered near a workbench.
hidden_clues: The prior team built the wrong countermeasure.

location_modules.name: Highway Shoulder
location_modules.description: Skid marks end where the guardrail bends outward. The air smells like hot rubber and wet fur.
surface_clues: A dashcam caught a shape moving faster than traffic.
Something scraped the roof of the car, not the door.
hidden_clues: The attack was baited by a sound broadcast from the church.

location_modules.name: Sealed Service Tunnel
location_modules.description: The tunnel slopes beneath the town. Every few yards, a Warden mark has been scratched out.
surface_clues: Old ward chalk has been cut by newer claw marks.
A cable runs from the annex speaker system into the dark.
hidden_clues: The cult uses sound to synchronize the rite through the whole town.

location_modules.name: Forest Clearing
location_modules.description: The trees bend inward. Bones hang from fishing line so thin it almost cannot be seen.
surface_clues: A lure made from a child's toy is tied to a branch.
The snow is clean except for one impossible footprint.
hidden_clues: The predator uses familiar voices to separate victims.

location_modules.name: Harlan Farmhouse
location_modules.description: A farmhouse with too many locked interior doors and family photos turned face down.
surface_clues: Family photos are burned on one side.
hidden_clues: The inside lock has blood on it.

location_modules.name: Root Cellar
location_modules.description: A cold root cellar under the house, packed with jars, dust, and one fresh line of salt.
surface_clues: The salt line was broken inward.
hidden_clues: A doll contains hair matching a living witness.

location_modules.name: Old Well
location_modules.description: An old stone well that echoes before anyone speaks.
surface_clues: A child drew this well with a door in it.
hidden_clues: The well repeats a Warden name three seconds early.

location_modules.name: County Sheriff Station
location_modules.description: A fluorescent office full of sealed reports, coffee, and one room no deputy will enter.
surface_clues: The report timeline has a missing gap.
hidden_clues: The archive stamp predates the Wardens.
suggestions: ask sheriff bell about missing minutes

location_modules.name: Evidence Lockup
location_modules.description: A cramped evidence room where old hunter gear was tagged as unrelated burglary evidence.
surface_clues: A relic box sits empty but warm.
hidden_clues: A hunter cache contains intentionally wrong ammo.

location_modules.name: Mercy Falls Hospital
location_modules.description: A small hospital running on backup power and careful lies.
surface_clues: The survivor coughs black ash when asked about the missing hour.
hidden_clues: Power outages match manifestation pulses.

location_modules.name: Hospital Records Room
location_modules.description: Locked cabinets, old admission books, and a printer repeating the same jammed page.
surface_clues: Body temperature reports do not make natural sense.
hidden_clues: Three living patients are marked on an old vessel chart.

location_modules.name: Roadside Crosses
location_modules.description: A roadside memorial for people who have not died yet.
surface_clues: Several crosses list living names.
hidden_clues: A phone call arrives from a victim one hour in the future.

location_modules.name: Old Weather Station
location_modules.description: Abandoned instruments still transmit pressure, wind speed, and something like prayer.
surface_clues: Wind data contains a chant.
hidden_clues: Static hides a backward prayer.

location_modules.name: Tower Control Room
location_modules.description: A room of dead radios, all tuned to different stations speaking in one voice.
surface_clues: Multiple radios form one choir.
hidden_clues: The choir speaks only after a clue is found.

location_modules.name: School Gym Shelter
location_modules.description: A school gym converted to emergency shelter after the first disappearances.
surface_clues: Chairs have scuffed the floor into a circle.
hidden_clues: The school bell rings after midnight despite being disconnected.

location_modules.name: School Hallway
location_modules.description: Lockers rattle in sequence when no one is nearby.
surface_clues: A child’s drawing shows a well under the school.
hidden_clues: A name disappears from paper each time spoken aloud.

location_modules.name: Abandoned Train Depot
location_modules.description: A depot closed after a disaster but still listed on tomorrow’s train schedule.
surface_clues: The schedule includes a dead stop.
hidden_clues: Clocks here skip one stolen minute.

location_modules.name: County Road 9
location_modules.description: The rural road connecting the case sites, lined with fields and dead phone zones.
surface_clues: Tire tracks stop abruptly in the middle of the road.
hidden_clues: The same black star is scratched into several mile markers.

location_modules.name: Motel Room 12
location_modules.description: A cheap motel room that returns to clean condition each dawn except for the blood.
surface_clues: The room resets except for a growing stain.
hidden_clues: The reset behaves like a wish.

location_modules.name: Rail Tunnel
location_modules.description: An unused rail tunnel where sound arrives long before its source.
surface_clues: The tunnel walls are scratched with passenger names.
hidden_clues: The names match tomorrow’s dead stop schedule.

witness_modules.name: Mrs Harlan
witness_modules.opening: She keeps folding and unfolding a tissue, watching the door like her son might still walk in.

son.response: Her son Caleb had been sneaking out after midnight. She thought it was drugs until she heard him whispering prayers he was never taught.

meetings.response: She admits Caleb attended meetings under the church, but says he was scared after the third one. He called it 'the lower room.'

lower room.response: Caleb said the lower room had a bell that did not ring with sound. It rang in his teeth. He drew nine circles around a black star afterward.

bell.response: She never saw the bell, but Caleb woke screaming whenever the church bell rang underground. There has not been a bell in that church for a hundred years.

black star.response: She shows you the back of an envelope. Caleb drew the black star over and over until the paper tore.

jacket.response: The jacket is still in his room. It smells of candle smoke, river mud, and something metallic.

profile.motive: survive the case and avoid being blamed
profile.secret: knows a detail they will only share with trust or proof

dialogue_options.background: Ask who they are, why they are involved, and what changed before the case became dangerous.
dialogue_options.fear: Ask what they are afraid will happen if the truth comes out.
dialogue_options.trust: Ask what proof they need before they cooperate.
dialogue_options.help: Ask what access, supplies, contacts, or local knowledge they can offer.

witness_modules.name: Sheriff Mara Voss
witness_modules.opening: The sheriff is polite in the way people are when they already decided what not to say.

church.response: She says the church is condemned and no one should be there. Her left hand tightens around a key ring when she says it.

key.response: The oldest key on the ring is not for the church doors. It is stamped with a Warden safehouse code.

old case.response: Fifteen years ago a deputy heard the same underground bell. The report claims carbon monoxide. The autopsy does not.

warden order.response: She finally admits a federal handler told her to keep everyone out of the church and burn any report mentioning bells.

witness_modules.name: Eli Danner
witness_modules.opening: Eli's lips are cracked black at the edges. When the monitor beeps, he flinches like it is a bell.

attack.response: He remembers Caleb laughing, then crying, then everyone staring at the floor when the bell rang beneath them.

bell.response: He says the bell did not make sound. It made everyone remember something that never happened.

caleb.response: Caleb tried to cut the rope holding the bell chain. Something wearing Caleb's voice told Eli to run.

false memory.response: Eli describes a childhood in a town that never existed. The street names are all old names for Mercy Falls mines.

witness_modules.name: Deputy Ross
witness_modules.opening: Ross keeps watching his corrupted bodycam footage with the volume muted.

bodycam.response: The footage goes black for thirteen seconds. The audio still records a low bell and someone saying 'open the ninth.'

audio.response: When slowed down, the bell is not ringing once. It is nine overlapping impacts.

church.response: He saw candlelight in the annex but no cars outside. The kids were already inside somehow.

witness_modules.name: Archivist Kline
witness_modules.opening: Kline knows exactly which drawer not to open. That is the drawer you notice first.

mine map.response: The official map ends above the lower room. A hand-drawn overlay shows another chamber and the phrase 'acoustic seal.'

black star.response: The symbol appears in three town disasters. Every time, official records blame gas, flood, or panic.

warden reports.response: One report survived as a carbon copy: 'Do not destroy the bell. Silence it. If destroyed, the thing below hears us clearly.'

witness_modules.name: Dr Sato
witness_modules.opening: Dr. Sato has treated shock before. This is not shock, and they know it.

black ash.response: The ash under Eli's nails is not from wood or paper. Under magnification it looks like burned bone and iron filings.

voice.response: Eli's second voice registers below human vocal range. The sound waveform matches the bodycam bell distortion.

injuries.response: The bruises form a pattern like fingers gripping from inside the rib cage.

witness_modules.name: Old Hunter Graves
witness_modules.opening: Graves has a sawed-off shotgun, a tremor in one hand, and the exhausted look of someone who survived the wrong lesson.

church.response: He says the church is not haunted. It is a lid. Bad hunters keep trying to shoot what is under it.

wrong lesson.response: His old team tried silver, salt, and fire. None mattered until the bell stopped vibrating.

countermeasure.response: Graves hid a silence rig in a field locker at the salvage yard. He never went back for it.

witness_modules.name: The Polite Stranger
witness_modules.opening: They smile without showing teeth and ask if you are here to return what was borrowed.

borrowed.response: They insist no one stole Caleb. Caleb accepted a door, and doors have prices.

door.response: The river bridge is one door. The lower room is another. One opens sideways. One opens downward.

price.response: The price was not Caleb's life. It was his name spoken by the thing below.

witness_modules.name: Nora Vale
witness_modules.opening: Nora has scratched the black star off her own wrist until the skin split.

meetings.response: The meetings were not worship. They were rehearsals. Everyone practiced speaking in one voice before going below.

leader.response: She never saw the leader's face clearly. The voice came from the speakers even when the power was out.

below.response: Below, the bell made them remember the same dream: a black ocean with something huge turning in it.

missing minutes.response: He claims dispatch lost power, but his hand moves to the lockup key when he says it.

warden badge.response: He admits the badge came from a sealed evidence box no one logged.

old evidence.response: He says the old hunter cache was tagged as burglary evidence before he took office.

witness_modules.opening: Nurse Vale keeps lowering her voice whenever the monitors click.

blackout.response: The lights cut out in pulses, exactly like something breathing through the building.

patient ash.response: The survivor coughs ash only when asked about the church or the bell.

missing hour.response: The chart says the patient was awake, but every camera frame is blank for eleven minutes.

drawing.response: He draws a well under the school and says the bell lives there when it is asleep.

bell.response: He says the bell rings before bad things happen, not after.

well.response: He writes a name, then panics when the letters fade off the page.

town founding.response: Every founding record is missing the same six pages. Someone removed the origin of the seal.

archive stamp.response: The stamp on the report predates the agency mark, but not the symbol.

black star.response: The black star appears only in cases marked unresolved, sealed, or buried.

next victim.response: He gives the name correctly, but the year is wrong by a century.

black star.response: He calls it the hole where a hymn should be.

angel.response: He says a mark burned cold when he lied and hot when he confessed.

witness_modules.opening: Jo has an old Warden patch and refuses to say where it came from.

patch.response: They found it in a cache full of the wrong ammo and a note that said obvious answers are bait.

cache.response: The cache was warm when opened, like something had just left it.

monster.response: Jo says the silver reacted to the anchor, not the thing wearing teeth.

witness_modules.name: Mabel Crane
witness_modules.opening: Mabel remembers every meal, especially the ones people deny ordering.

cult.response: Different people ordered the exact same meal before every midnight meeting.

meetings.response: They never paid in cash or card. They left old coins with tomorrow’s date.

missing people.response: The missing all stopped here after visiting the church, bridge, or station.

witness_modules.name: Edwin Sims
witness_modules.opening: Sims says the radios keep reporting pressure inside people, not storms.

signal.response: The wind data is a chant if you plot it as sound instead of weather.

choir.response: Every radio chooses a different station, but the voice is identical.

evidence_modules.name: Bell Chain
evidence_modules.surface: A rusted chain runs behind a bricked arch.
evidence_modules.deep: The chain is tuned, not merely hung. It conducts vibration through the foundation.
evidence_modules.hidden: The chain can be dampened with cloth, wax, salt paste, or the silence rig.

evidence_modules.name: Nine-Circle Black Star Symbol
evidence_modules.surface: Nine circles orbit a black star, each ring scored deeper than the last.
evidence_modules.deep: The symbol is not a summoning mark. It is a countdown representation of layered seals.
evidence_modules.hidden: The active seal is the ninth; each bell resonance thins it.

evidence_modules.name: Torn Sign-In Sheet
evidence_modules.surface: The bottom half is missing. The remaining names are mostly teenagers and grieving adults.
evidence_modules.deep: Meeting dates match nights when witnesses heard the underground bell.
evidence_modules.hidden: The missing half contains the speaker access code written in the margin.

evidence_modules.name: Black Ash Under Fingernails
evidence_modules.surface: The ash is packed under the nails like the survivor clawed through a burned wall.
evidence_modules.deep: It contains burned bone, iron filings, and old lime mortar.
evidence_modules.hidden: The mix matches the lower room's old ward repair, meaning the survivor touched the seal itself.

evidence_modules.name: Altered Mine Map
evidence_modules.surface: The public mine map ends one chamber too soon.
evidence_modules.deep: A hand-drawn Warden overlay shows a lower chamber beneath the altar.
evidence_modules.hidden: The lower chamber is labeled 'acoustic seal — do not collapse.'

evidence_modules.name: Corrupted Bodycam Audio
evidence_modules.surface: The video dies, but the audio captures a bell and a phrase: open the ninth.
evidence_modules.deep: The bell is nine tones overlapping, each slightly delayed.
evidence_modules.hidden: One tone is missing unless played through the church PA system.

evidence_modules.name: Old Warden Field Locker
evidence_modules.surface: Inside the refrigerator shell is a rusted Warden locker sealed with salt paste.
evidence_modules.deep: It contains waxed cloth, chalk, iron nails, dead batteries, and half-built silence rig components.
evidence_modules.hidden: A note says: 'Do not shoot the bell. Stop it from hearing itself.'

evidence_modules.name: Mirror Dates
evidence_modules.surface: Dates are written across the motel mirror in soap.
evidence_modules.deep: Each date follows a minor tremor beneath the town by one day.
evidence_modules.hidden: The next date is tonight.

evidence_modules.name: Red Thread Offering
evidence_modules.surface: Red thread ties coins, milk caps, and dried flowers to the bridge railing.
evidence_modules.deep: Each knot is tied with a name spoken once and then forgotten.
evidence_modules.hidden: One knot contains Caleb's nickname, not his legal name.

evidence_modules.name: Scratched Warden Marks
evidence_modules.surface: Old Warden marks have been scratched out with something sharp and patient.
evidence_modules.deep: The scratched marks once redirected vibration away from the lower room.
evidence_modules.hidden: Repairing three marks can reduce the bell's pressure long enough for a rite.

evidence_modules.name: Dashcam Shape
evidence_modules.surface: The footage shows a tall shape crossing the road faster than a deer.
evidence_modules.deep: The shape flinches when headlights cross iron guardrail bolts.
evidence_modules.hidden: The highway attack was a lure, not the primary hunt.

evidence_modules.name: Hanging Bones
evidence_modules.surface: Bones hang from nearly invisible fishing line, clicking softly in the wind.
evidence_modules.deep: The pattern imitates a church bell's swing.
evidence_modules.hidden: The forest sign is a copycat lure planted by something human or cult-linked.

evidence_modules.name: Burned Family Photos
evidence_modules.surface: Every photo is burned on the same side.
evidence_modules.deep: The burned side always faces the person who heard the bell first.
evidence_modules.hidden: The burn pattern forms a partial black star when the photos are stacked.

evidence_modules.name: Blood on the Inside Lock
evidence_modules.surface: Blood stains the inside of a locked door.
evidence_modules.deep: No one broke in. Something was contained and let out.
evidence_modules.hidden: The blood is not human, but mimics human markers under basic tests.

evidence_modules.name: Broken Inward Salt Line
evidence_modules.surface: A salt line has been broken inward.
evidence_modules.deep: The safe area became a trap because the threat was already inside.
evidence_modules.hidden: The line was crossed by something wearing a living body.

evidence_modules.name: Child’s Well Drawing
evidence_modules.surface: A child drew a stone well with a door inside it.
evidence_modules.deep: The door matches a sealed hatch under the real well.
evidence_modules.hidden: The drawing changes when placed near iron.

evidence_modules.name: Hospital Power Log
evidence_modules.surface: Outages happen in repeating pulses.
evidence_modules.deep: The pulses match the survivor’s breathing when the ash cough begins.
evidence_modules.hidden: The pulse graph can be read as a summoning cadence.

evidence_modules.name: Dispatch Recording Gap
evidence_modules.surface: Dispatch audio cuts for eleven minutes.
evidence_modules.deep: A quiet bell tone remains under the silence.
evidence_modules.hidden: The missing audio returns if played beside the old Warden badge.

evidence_modules.name: Empty Warm Relic Box
evidence_modules.surface: An empty relic box is warm to the touch.
evidence_modules.deep: It was opened recently from the inside.
evidence_modules.hidden: The missing relic was a sound-dampening chain, not a weapon.

evidence_modules.name: Tomorrow-Dated Toll Coin
evidence_modules.surface: A coin under the bridge is dated tomorrow.
evidence_modules.deep: The coin is payment for crossing before the crossing happens.
evidence_modules.hidden: A name is etched on the rim, but disappears when spoken.

evidence_modules.name: Backward Static Prayer
evidence_modules.surface: A prayer hides under static.
evidence_modules.deep: Played backward, it is an invitation rather than protection.
evidence_modules.hidden: The same phrase appears in the black star records.

evidence_modules.name: Scuffed Gym Circle
evidence_modules.surface: Dragged chairs have carved a circular scuff into the floor.
evidence_modules.deep: The circle is too clean to be accidental; it is a rehearsal diagram.
evidence_modules.hidden: Each chair leg marks a victim position.

evidence_modules.name: Dead-Line Train Schedule
evidence_modules.surface: The depot appears on tomorrow’s schedule.
evidence_modules.deep: Every listed passenger has a memorial cross on County Road 9.
evidence_modules.hidden: The train never arrives; the dead are delivered to the platform.

evidence_modules.name: Repeating Motel Room
evidence_modules.surface: Room 12 resets every morning.
evidence_modules.deep: Only the bloodstain persists, growing by one handprint per reset.
evidence_modules.hidden: The reset is a wish trying to erase its own cost.

evidence_modules.name: Gas Station Bathroom Sigils
evidence_modules.surface: Bathroom graffiti repeats in groups of nine.
evidence_modules.deep: It is a route map disguised as profanity.
evidence_modules.hidden: Every route ends under the church.

evidence_modules.name: Bone Charm Bundle
evidence_modules.surface: Bone charms hang in a window frame.
evidence_modules.deep: The number of charms increases after every failed attempt.
evidence_modules.hidden: The charms count accepted bargains, not victims.

evidence_modules.name: Vessel Bloodline Chart
evidence_modules.surface: A bloodline chart lists living people as possible vessels.
evidence_modules.deep: One name has been crossed out after each black sea dream.
evidence_modules.hidden: The chart is not predicting vessels; it is selecting replacements.

evidence_modules.name: Black Star Mile Markers
evidence_modules.surface: Several mile markers are scratched with the black star.
evidence_modules.deep: The scratched numbers form a route between old sealed sites.
evidence_modules.hidden: Each marker rotates one ninth after a connected death.

sign_modules.name: Sulfur Trace
sign_modules.surface: A sulfur odor blooms and vanishes without a source.
sign_modules.deep: The scent spikes near thresholds and speaker wiring.

sign_modules.name: Localized Cold Spot
sign_modules.surface: The air drops cold enough to fog breath.
sign_modules.deep: The cold follows names spoken aloud, not movement.

sign_modules.name: Wrong Reflection
sign_modules.surface: A reflection lags half a second behind.
sign_modules.deep: Only the reflected room shows an extra door.

sign_modules.name: Iron Flinch
sign_modules.surface: The target avoids iron without acknowledging it.
sign_modules.deep: Iron does not injure immediately; it interrupts disguise and crossing.

sign_modules.name: Black Ash
sign_modules.surface: Fine black ash gathers where hands touched stone.
sign_modules.deep: The ash contains burned bone, old lime, and iron filings.

sign_modules.name: Shared Phrase
sign_modules.surface: Different witnesses repeat the same phrase word-for-word.
sign_modules.deep: The cadence matches the bodycam audio distortion.

sign_modules.name: Impossible Tracks
sign_modules.surface: Tracks begin where no path leads in and stop before open ground.
sign_modules.deep: The stride changes when the track crosses old ward lines.

sign_modules.name: Erased Record
sign_modules.surface: A file exists in the index but not in the drawer.
sign_modules.deep: The missing number appears in a Warden report carbon copy.

sign_modules.name: Red Thread Knot
sign_modules.surface: Red thread binds offerings to a railing or doorframe.
sign_modules.deep: Each knot encodes a name or nickname.

sign_modules.name: Damaged Ward Geometry
sign_modules.surface: Old ward lines are scratched through at precise points.
sign_modules.deep: The cuts redirect sound toward the lower room.

sign_modules.name: Childlike Prophetic Drawing
sign_modules.surface: A childish drawing shows a place the child has never seen.
sign_modules.deep: The drawing includes a hidden door, route, or anchor symbol.

sign_modules.name: Black Ash Breath
sign_modules.surface: A survivor coughs black ash during specific questions.
sign_modules.deep: The ash appears only when the host resists the possessing voice.

sign_modules.name: Backward Radio Prayer
sign_modules.surface: Radio static forms half-heard prayer.
sign_modules.deep: Reversed playback changes it into an invitation.

sign_modules.name: Red Thread at the Threshold
sign_modules.surface: A red thread is tied across or around a door.
sign_modules.deep: It marks where a bargain was accepted.

sign_modules.name: Warm Empty Relic Box
sign_modules.surface: An empty relic box is warm and humming.
sign_modules.deep: The missing object left recently or was taken from inside.

sign_modules.name: Wrong Countermeasure Cache
sign_modules.surface: A hunter cache is stocked for the wrong entity.
sign_modules.deep: The mistake looks deliberate, not careless.

sign_modules.name: Living Names on Memorial Crosses
sign_modules.surface: Memorial crosses list people still alive.
sign_modules.deep: The dates point to future attack windows.

sign_modules.name: Synchronized Missing Minute
sign_modules.surface: Every clock skips the same minute.
sign_modules.deep: The missing minute is when the entity acts unseen.

sign_modules.name: Soured Milk Offering
sign_modules.surface: Milk spoils instantly near a doorway.
sign_modules.deep: A fae rule has been accepted at that threshold.

sign_modules.name: Delayed Reflection
sign_modules.surface: A reflection moves a beat late.
sign_modules.deep: The host, spirit, or illusion is not perfectly synchronized with the body.

sign_modules.name: Animal Refusal
sign_modules.surface: Animals refuse to enter a location.
sign_modules.deep: They react to a threshold rule rather than visible danger.

sign_modules.name: Frost-Written Warning
sign_modules.surface: Words form in frost on the window.
sign_modules.deep: The message responds to questions about hosts and vessels.

sign_modules.name: Future Phone Call
sign_modules.surface: A phone receives a call from someone not yet dead.
sign_modules.deep: The call comes from the next pressure-clock threshold.

sign_modules.name: Impossible Floor
sign_modules.surface: An elevator or stairwell opens onto a floor not in the plans.
sign_modules.deep: The building is becoming a map of the seal beneath it.

prep_modules.name: Salt Line
prep_modules.effect: Blocks or slows spirits and some infernal crossing. Reduces haunt/possession pressure by 1 when placed correctly.
prep_modules.requires: salt pack or improvised salt source

prep_modules.name: Iron Nail Threshold
prep_modules.effect: Interrupts fae crossing, glamour, and some threshold tricks. Adds +1 prep against fae or veil distortions.
prep_modules.requires: iron nails or cold iron scraps

prep_modules.name: Silver Rounds
prep_modules.effect: Bypasses many beast/predator resistances. Useless against pure ritual structure unless the entity manifests physically.

prep_modules.name: Silence Ward
prep_modules.effect: Dampens the bell resonance. Required for the black choir / lower room resolution path.
prep_modules.requires: waxed cloth, chalk, iron nails, or field locker rig

prep_modules.name: Exorcism Space
prep_modules.effect: Creates a controlled place to separate possessor from host. Requires time and protection.

prep_modules.name: Ward Repair
prep_modules.effect: Restores old Warden geometry, reducing pressure and slowing ritual progress.

prep_modules.name: Bait Trap
prep_modules.effect: Pulls predator into chosen ground if the clue trail identifies its hunger or hunting method.

prep_modules.name: Mirror Cover
prep_modules.effect: Blocks mirror shade or illusion line-of-sight. Can reveal false room logic.

prep_modules.name: Speaker Cutoff
prep_modules.effect: Severs one sound-channel used by the ritual network. Reduces Black Choir pressure.
prep_modules.requires: access to annex or tunnel cable

prep_modules.name: True Name Research
prep_modules.effect: Opens binding or bargain resolution paths. Usually needs records plus witness truth.

prep_modules.name: Iron Nail Threshold
prep_modules.effect: Locks a doorway, well, or bridge against casual crossing and exposes fae pressure.

prep_modules.name: Grounding Line
prep_modules.effect: Bleeds off supernatural signal pressure and reduces radio/PA manifestations.

prep_modules.name: Verified Evidence Chain Packet
prep_modules.effect: Protects research from false-witness corruption and reduces investigation misdirection.

prep_modules.name: Rowan Snare
prep_modules.effect: Restrains night-roaming fae and forces a bargain-maker to manifest or answer.

prep_modules.name: Saltwater Lantern
prep_modules.effect: Reveals omen spirits and lets a false memorial be safely corrected.

prep_modules.name: Clock Synchronization Rite
prep_modules.effect: Restores a stolen minute long enough to confront time-skipping entities.

prep_modules.name: Wish-Cost Ledger
prep_modules.effect: Names the cost of a wish and makes djinn loops easier to break.

prep_modules.name: Bloodline Ward
prep_modules.effect: Stabilizes a possible vessel or suppresses bloodline-triggered possession.

prep_modules.name: Wrong-Prep Audit
prep_modules.effect: Confirms whether gear matches the actual entity instead of the obvious false lead.

prep_modules.name: Ash Anchor Jars
prep_modules.effect: Contains burned keepsake anchors so a possession queen cannot reseed through them.

prep_modules.name: True Name Quarantine
prep_modules.effect: Lets Wardens test a name without speaking it aloud into the case.

prep_modules.name: Route Map Overlay
prep_modules.effect: Connects modular sites into a seal route and identifies which location should be checked next.

complication_modules.name: Witness Panics
complication_modules.effect: The witness shuts down, calls authority, or flees to a dangerous place.

complication_modules.name: False Lead
complication_modules.effect: The next theory points toward the wrong entity unless cross-checked.

complication_modules.name: Ambush Window
complication_modules.effect: The threat gets a free hostile move against an isolated Warden.

complication_modules.name: Gear Failure
complication_modules.effect: A prepared tool works once, then breaks or adds a setback.

complication_modules.name: Ritual Backlash
complication_modules.effect: Caster gains strain, false vision, or unwanted attention.

complication_modules.name: Authority Blocks Access
complication_modules.effect: Sheriff, hospital, or records office access is restricted.

complication_modules.name: Split Memory
complication_modules.effect: Different players receive conflicting private descriptions.

complication_modules.name: Countdown Advances
complication_modules.effect: The ritual advances by one stage and another sign appears.

complication_modules.name: Possession Spike
complication_modules.effect: A Warden or NPC must resist a control impulse.

complication_modules.name: Location Compromised
complication_modules.effect: A safe or known location becomes unsafe.

complication_modules.name: Witness Vanishes
complication_modules.trigger: failed social investigation or high pressure
complication_modules.effect: A key witness disappears, leaving only one private clue behind.

complication_modules.name: Authority Lockdown
complication_modules.effect: Access to records or evidence requires deception, warrant, or stealth.

complication_modules.name: Wrong Gear Trap
complication_modules.effect: The prepared gear works, but against the wrong threat; blind confrontation gains extra pressure.

complication_modules.name: Private Message from Entity
complication_modules.effect: One Warden receives a useful but manipulative private clue.

complication_modules.name: Location Shifts
complication_modules.effect: A known exit leads to a different module until the anchor is identified.

complication_modules.name: Possessed Ally Micro-Action
complication_modules.effect: The entity takes one small action through a host or NPC.

complication_modules.name: Memory Contamination
complication_modules.effect: A clue is true but attached to the wrong person until verified.

complication_modules.name: Ritual Clock Advances
complication_modules.trigger: failure, delay, or wait during sigil case
complication_modules.effect: The active ritual gains a stage and unlocks a crisis sign.

complication_modules.name: Safehouse Not Safe
complication_modules.trigger: returning to safety with unrevealed anchor
complication_modules.effect: A prep location becomes compromised and gear may be sabotaged.

complication_modules.name: False Confession
complication_modules.effect: An NPC confesses to protect someone or because testimony is corrupted.

complication_modules.name: Environment Turns Hostile
complication_modules.effect: Terrain adds setbacks until a prep module stabilizes it.

complication_modules.name: Cost Comes Due
complication_modules.trigger: using powerful prep or relic without knowing cost
complication_modules.effect: A bargain, wish, or relic cost is collected immediately.

clue_definitions.clue_caleb_midnight: Caleb was sneaking out after midnight before the incident.
clue_definitions.clue_lower_room: A hidden lower room exists beneath the church.
clue_definitions.clue_black_star: Nine circles around a black star mark the deeper threat.
clue_definitions.clue_bell_resonator: The underground bell resonates through the seal rather than ringing normally.
clue_definitions.clue_underground_bell: Witnesses hear a bell underground despite no church bell existing.
clue_definitions.clue_black_star_drawing: Caleb drew the black star repeatedly before vanishing.
clue_definitions.clue_smoke_mud_metal: Caleb's jacket links candle smoke, river mud, and metal trace.
clue_definitions.clue_sheriff_key: The sheriff has an old key connected to the church or Wardens.
clue_definitions.clue_warden_key: The key is marked with an old Warden safehouse code.
clue_definitions.clue_old_case: A similar incident occurred fifteen years ago and was mislabeled.
clue_definitions.clue_warden_coverup: A Warden handler ordered local records suppressed.
clue_definitions.clue_group_floor_stare: The group stared at the floor when the bell sounded.
clue_definitions.clue_memory_bell: The bell creates shared false memories.
clue_definitions.clue_bell_chain: The bell chain leads toward the lower chamber.
clue_definitions.clue_mine_memory: False memories contain old mine street names.
clue_definitions.clue_nine_impacts: The bell audio contains nine overlapping impacts.
clue_definitions.clue_annex_candlelight: Candlelight was seen in the annex with no cars outside.
clue_definitions.clue_acoustic_seal: The lower chamber was labeled as an acoustic seal.
clue_definitions.clue_star_disasters: The black star appears across several town disasters.
clue_definitions.clue_do_not_destroy_bell: Old Warden report warns not to destroy the bell.
clue_definitions.clue_ash_bone_iron: Black ash contains burned bone and iron filings.
clue_definitions.clue_voice_matches_bell: The survivor's voice distortion matches the bell audio.
clue_definitions.clue_internal_grip: Bruises suggest possession pressure from inside the body.
clue_definitions.clue_church_is_lid: An old hunter says the church is a lid, not just a haunted site.
clue_definitions.clue_silence_over_damage: Stopping the bell matters more than damaging the entity.
clue_definitions.clue_silence_rig: An old Warden silence rig may exist at the salvage yard.
clue_definitions.clue_door_price: A fae or threshold bargain may have opened access.
clue_definitions.clue_two_doors: The bridge and lower room are both thresholds.
clue_definitions.clue_name_price: A name was part of a bargain price.
clue_definitions.clue_rehearsal_chant: The meetings were rehearsals for speaking in one voice.
clue_definitions.clue_speaker_voice: The leader's voice came through speakers with no power.
clue_definitions.clue_black_ocean_dream: The cult shares a dream of a black ocean and a huge thing turning.
clue_definitions.clue_meeting_dates: Meeting dates match underground bell reports.
clue_definitions.clue_ninth_seal: The ninth seal is active and thinning.
clue_definitions.clue_do_not_shoot_bell: Do not shoot the bell; it must be silenced, not shattered.
clue_definitions.clue_next_date_tonight: The next ritual date is tonight.
clue_definitions.clue_ward_redirect: Scratched Warden marks redirect sound toward the seal.
clue_definitions.clue_iron_flinch: A road predator flinched at iron guardrail bolts.
clue_definitions.clue_copycat_lure: A forest clue is staged to imitate the bell pattern.
clue_definitions.clue_child_drawing_well: A child drew the well with a door inside it; no adult claims to know why.
clue_definitions.clue_well_echo_name: The well repeats a Warden name three seconds before anyone says it.
clue_definitions.clue_hospital_blackout_pattern: Hospital outages match the exact pulse of the entity’s manifestation cycle.
clue_definitions.clue_patient_ash_cough: The survivor coughs black ash only when questioned about the missing hour.
clue_definitions.clue_sheriff_erased_minutes: The sheriff’s report is missing eleven minutes between dispatch and arrival.
clue_definitions.clue_body_temp_drop: The corpse temperature dropped too quickly for natural death.
clue_definitions.clue_animal_refusal: Animals refuse to cross the threshold even when forced or hungry.
clue_definitions.clue_three_knocks: Three knocks precede every escalation event.
clue_definitions.clue_red_thread_bargain: A red thread tied around a doorknob marks an accepted bargain.
clue_definitions.clue_milk_sour_threshold: Milk spoils instantly near the marked threshold.
clue_definitions.clue_iron_burned_floor: The floorboards are burned in the shape of old iron nails.
clue_definitions.clue_lullaby_same_voice: Different witnesses heard the same lullaby in the same impossible voice.
clue_definitions.clue_old_weather_station_signal: A weather station recorded chanting where wind data should be.
clue_definitions.clue_static_prayer: A prayer is hidden under radio static, playing backward.
clue_definitions.clue_roadside_cross_wrong_names: Roadside crosses list names of people who are still alive.
clue_definitions.clue_motel_room_repeats: Motel room 12 resets every morning except for one growing bloodstain.
clue_definitions.clue_train_schedule_dead: A train schedule shows a stop that was closed after a mass death.
clue_definitions.clue_cemetery_grave_empty: The grave is empty, but the soil above it is freshly warm.
clue_definitions.clue_school_bell_after_midnight: The school bell rings at midnight despite being disconnected.
clue_definitions.clue_gym_floor_circle: The gym floor is scuffed into a perfect ritual circle by dragged chairs.
clue_definitions.clue_factory_locker_names: Old factory lockers contain names of current victims.
clue_definitions.clue_burned_photo_half: Half of every family photo is burned, always the same side.
clue_definitions.clue_blood_on_inside_lock: Blood is on the inside of the lock, not outside.
clue_definitions.clue_salt_line_broken_inward: The salt line was broken from inside the safe room.
clue_definitions.clue_doll_hair_match: Hair inside the doll matches a witness who never entered the house.
clue_definitions.clue_drain_whispers: Whispers rise through drains whenever holy water is nearby.
clue_definitions.clue_river_runs_backward: The river current reverses for exactly thirteen seconds at dusk.
clue_definitions.clue_bridge_toll_coin: A coin under the bridge is minted with tomorrow’s date.
clue_definitions.clue_library_pages_removed: Every book about the town founding is missing the same six pages.
clue_definitions.clue_archivist_stamp_false: An archive stamp appears official but predates the agency itself.
clue_definitions.clue_relic_box_empty_warm: An empty relic box is warm and humming like something just escaped.
clue_definitions.clue_camera_frame_extra_person: Every camera frame includes one extra person no one remembers.
clue_definitions.clue_mirror_host_delay: The host’s reflection moves half a second late.
clue_definitions.clue_witness_speaks_plural: The witness slips into “we” when describing being alone.
clue_definitions.clue_cult_meal_receipts: Receipts from the diner show identical meals bought by different cult members.
clue_definitions.clue_gas_station_sigils: Bathroom graffiti at the gas station is actually a repeating sigil sequence.
clue_definitions.clue_hunter_cache_wrong_ammo: The hunter cache is stocked with the wrong countermeasure on purpose.
clue_definitions.clue_quartermaster_warning: An old quartermaster note says, “If it looks obvious, it is bait.”
clue_definitions.clue_bone_charm_count: Bone charms increase by one after every failed investigation attempt.
clue_definitions.clue_window_frost_words: Frost on the window forms the words “not the first vessel.”
clue_definitions.clue_choir_many_radios: Multiple radios speak as one choir from different stations.
clue_definitions.clue_dream_black_sea: Dreams of a black sea arrive only after a clue is found.
clue_definitions.clue_wendigo_no_tracks_return: Tracks enter the woods, but none come back — not even animal tracks.
clue_definitions.clue_silver_reacts_black: Silver turns black near the true anchor, not near the entity.
clue_definitions.clue_fire_refuses_burn: Fire refuses to burn in the room where the victim vanished.
clue_definitions.clue_fae_name_erasure: A name disappears from paper each time it is spoken aloud.
clue_definitions.clue_djinn_wish_echo: Every wish leaves an echo of what it cost in nearby reflections.
clue_definitions.clue_vampire_no_invite: The victim invited someone in, but every neighbor remembers a different guest.
clue_definitions.clue_werewolf_moon_not_needed: The attack happened under a new moon; this is not ordinary lycanthropy.
clue_definitions.clue_rugaru_food_hoard: The suspect hides untouched food everywhere, but is starving anyway.
clue_definitions.clue_shadow_light_wrong: The shadow moves toward the flashlight instead of away.
clue_definitions.clue_wraith_tether_song: The wraith’s tether is a song, not an object.
clue_definitions.clue_possessor_avoids_pronouns: The possessor avoids first-person pronouns when speaking through the host.
clue_definitions.clue_contract_fine_print_breath: Fine print appears only when someone breathes on the contract.
clue_definitions.clue_angel_mark_heat: A divine mark burns hot near lies and cold near truth.
clue_definitions.clue_vessel_bloodline_chart: A bloodline chart marks three living people as possible vessels.
clue_definitions.clue_seal_ninth_rotation: The seal rotates one ninth after every death connected to the case.
clue_definitions.clue_clock_stolen_minute: Every clock in the site skips the same missing minute.
clue_definitions.clue_phone_calls_future: A phone receives calls from a version of the victim one hour in the future.
clue_definitions.clue_elevator_extra_floor: The elevator opens onto a floor that is not in the building plans.
clue_definitions.clue_basement_smells_rain: The basement smells like rain from a storm that has not happened yet.
clue_definitions.clue_prophet_wrong_date: A street preacher predicts the next victim but gives the wrong year.
clue_definitions.clue_bible_margin_map: A Bible margin contains a hand-drawn map to a sealed chamber.
clue_definitions.clue_teeth_in_ashtray: Human teeth in the ashtray belong to someone still alive.
clue_definitions.clue_ritual_blood_not_human: The ritual blood is not human, but it pretends to be under tests.
clue_definitions.clue_wardens_old_badge: An old Warden badge is hidden where only the entity could place it.
clue_definitions.clue_final_anchor_is_story: The anchor is not an object; it is the repeated story everyone keeps telling wrong.

npc_ally_modules.name: Deputy Mara Vale
npc_ally_modules.opening: A tired deputy with a folder full of reports she was told not to file.

recruitment.failure: She refuses to risk her badge without proof.

reports.response: Mara can quietly pull incident reports that were reclassified as animal attacks or drug calls.

coverup.response: She says the sheriff signs off on strange cases personally, then seals them in a side cabinet.

profile.motive: help the Wardens if proof justifies the risk
profile.secret: knows a detail they will only share with trust or proof

dialogue_options.background: Ask who they are, why they are involved, and what changed before the case became dangerous.
dialogue_options.fear: Ask what they are afraid will happen if the truth comes out.
dialogue_options.trust: Ask what proof they need before they cooperate.
dialogue_options.help: Ask what access, supplies, contacts, or local knowledge they can offer.

npc_ally_modules.opening: An old priest who knows the basement was sealed for a reason.

recruitment.test: Charisma + Persuasion or Will + Ritual Casting

bell.response: Crowe says the bell was removed from the steeple in 1911 because it rang after the miners died.

exorcism.response: He can serve as a trusted witness for an exorcism, but only if the host can be restrained safely.

cache.response: He marked a storage locker years ago. If it is still there, it may hold emergency Wardens gear.

church.response: The clerk says people still drive toward the old church after midnight, even though no event is listed.

bell.response: They heard a bell through the cooler doors, but thought it was a truck backing up.

stranger_modules.name: Motel Owner
smalltalk: They talk about cancellations, bad plumbing, and a smell like pennies after storms.

mirrors.response: Every mirror in their rooms was covered with towels. One towel had a nine-ring symbol drawn in ash.

bridge.response: They refuse to cross the bridge after midnight. The GPS always says they are already on the other side.

warden_hq_modules.name: Regional Warden Field Office
warden_hq_modules.description: A disguised administrative office with case files, gear lockers, sleeping rooms, and a back-room briefing table.

warden_hq_modules.name: Blackwood Safehouse
warden_hq_modules.description: A rural Warden house with salt in the walls, old maps, and a cellar full of labeled evidence crates.

warden_hq_modules.name: Archive Annex Substation
warden_hq_modules.description: A climate-controlled records annex hidden behind a county document storage contractor.

warden_hq_modules.name: Mobile Hunter Van
warden_hq_modules.description: An armored, unmarked van that rotates through active cases with ammo, traps, and a tired operator.

warden_hq_modules.name: Chapel Bunker
warden_hq_modules.description: A buried chapel room beneath a burned roadside mission, still consecrated and still monitored.
